title: Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued June 29 at 4:42PM CDT until June 29 at 5:00PM CDT by NWS Duluth MN
description: At 442 PM CDT, severe thunderstorms were located along a line extending from near Red Cliff to near Washburn to near Sanborn, moving east at 40 mph. HAZARD...60 mph wind gusts and half dollar size hail. SOURCE...Radar indicated. IMPACT...Hail damage to vehicles is expected. Expect wind damage to roofs, siding, and trees. These severe storms will be near... Ashland, Bayfield, La Pointe, Odanah, and Madeline Island around 445 PM CDT. Other locations in the path of these severe thunderstorms include Big Bay State Park.
text:
At 4:42 PM Central Daylight Time, severe thunderstorms were located along a line extending from near Red Cliff to near Washburn to near Sanborn, moving east at 40 miles per hour. Hazard: 60 miles per hour wind gusts and half dollar size hail. Source: Radar indicated.

Impact: Hail damage to vehicles is expected. Expect wind damage to roofs, siding, and trees. These severe storms will be near...
speech_text:
Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued June 29 at 4:42PM CDT until June 29 at 5:00PM CDT by NWS Duluth MN.

At 4:42 PM Central Daylight Time, severe thunderstorms were located along a line extending from near Red Cliff to near Washburn to near Sanborn, moving east at 40 miles per hour. Hazard: 60 miles per hour wind gusts and half dollar size hail. Source: Radar indicated.

Impact: Hail damage to vehicles is expected. Expect wind damage to roofs, siding, and trees. These severe storms will be near...
thai_text:
เวลา 4:42 PM น. ตอนกลางวัน มีฝนฟ้าคะนองที่รุนแรง ติดเส้นทางจากใกล้ Red Cliff ถึงใกล้ Washburn ถึงใกล้ Sanborn. เดินทางทางตะวันออกด้วยความเร็ว 40 ไมล์ต่อชั่วโมง. ความเสี่ยง: ลมพายุ 60 ไมล์ต่อชั่วโมง์ต่อชั่วโมง และฝนฟ้าคะนองขนาดครึ่งดอลลาร์. แหล่งข่าว: ราดาร์แสดง.

ผล กระทบ: คาดว่าจะเกิดความเสียหายจากฝนฟ้าคะนอง. คาดหวังความเสียหายจากลมที่หลังคา ติดข้าง และต้นไม้. พายุรุนแรงเหล่านี้จะใกล้...
